violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per PIC, owner is in progress of receiving license. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

One of the hot hold bulbs was observed not working an in poor repair. The chicken underneath the non-working bulb was observed at 136DF. Chicken was moved under a working bulb at the time of inspection. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

Chicken breast was cooked to between 115-130 degrees Fahrenheit. Poultry must be cooked to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. PIC reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit and/or above. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

Cole slaw was observed held at 65 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed in 1 door cooler. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit, plates, and ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

An air gap is lacking at the food prep sinks (produce and chicken prep sinks). A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of cardboard, equipment, and other debris around the refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the food storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
Inspector observed a box of cookie dough, located in the walk-in freezer, being stored beneath a leaking fan unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep freezer have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
